meaning: n.摆动(或挥动)的人,赶时髦的人
examples: That girl is not a swinger.
One could do worse than be a swinger of birches.
You can hardly recognize in him the swinger he was thirty years ago.
Nevada, Colorado and New Mexico account for 20 electoral-college votes, compared with 18 for perennial swinger Ohio.
Few Spaniards think him much fun: a workaholic who follows football avidly and bullfighting a bit, but no swinger.
